operating_ranges.evidence: Liquid-injected screw compressor elements can be manufactured for high pressure ratios, with one compression stage usually being sufficient for pressure up to 14 and even 17 bar
Temperature of air leaving outlet valve, approx. celsius: 30

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: The rotors and housing are manufactured with ultimate precision to minimize leakage from the pressure side to the inlet
reduced internal leakage due to asymmetric screw profiles

fault_conditions.name: inlet_valve_stuck_closed
fault_conditions.description: compressor starts running but does not load after delay time
fault_conditions.evidence: Inlet valve (IV) stuck in closed position

fault_conditions.name: oil_separator_clogged
fault_conditions.symptoms: compressor air output or pressure below normal

maintenance_actions.name: oil_separator_replacement
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: air flow capacity and pressure performance
maintenance_actions.evidence: Oil separator element (OS) clogged → Have element replaced

maintenance_actions.name: separator_inspection
maintenance_actions.evidence: Every time the separator element is renewed, examine the discharge pipe and the inside of the oil separator vessel for carbon deposits

assumptions.statement: Oil injection provides cooling, lubrication and sealing
assumptions.reason: Manual states oil function is to cool and lubricate the compressor element's moving parts, to cool the air being compressed internally, and to reduce the return leakage to the inlet

assumptions.statement: Twin screw rotors operate without mechanical contact
assumptions.reason: Manual states the rotors neither come into contact with each other nor with the compressor housing for oil-free variants
